title: Stisseria pulchella
taxonomy: Stisseria pulchella is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is native to South Africa and is characterized by its delicate, white flowers. It is a member of the subtribe Stapeliinae, which includes other species of Stapelia and related genera. The classification of Stisseria pulchella is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. This classification provides a detailed understanding of the plant's taxonomic position within the plant kingdom.
